subcodes.first_line: Praised be God, Who is sanctified beyond all mention and praise, and exalted above whatsoever the tongue may utter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله المقدس عن الذکر و الثناء و المتعالی عما یتکلم به اللسان و یتحرک
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @unity in diversity, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @unity; oneness of humanity, @goodly deeds; actions
